item.title: Trump 100% Drug Tariffs
item.description:
• Summary: Former President Trump signs an order imposing 100% tariffs on imported drugs from countries without trade deals, with exceptions for certain drugs and countries. This policy shift, under Section 232, aims to address drug pricing but may delay European drug launches and impact pharmaceutical trade dynamics. Companies without Most-Favored-Nation (MFN) pricing agreements are targeted, raising concerns about market access and supply chain disruptions.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Fierce Pharma, Endpoints News, STAT News, Fierce Pharma, Endpoints News, STAT News, STAT News, BioSpace, BioSpace

item.title: DOJ 340B Dispute
item.description:
• Summary: The Department of Justice has intervened in favor of pharmaceutical companies in a legal dispute over the 340B drug discount program. This decision could influence pricing policies and access to medications for covered entities.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Endpoints News

item.title: FDA AI/Medical Device Policy
item.description:
• Summary: The FDA is evolving its regulatory stance on AI and breakthrough medical devices, with new policies aimed at balancing innovation and safety in health technology. Discussions focus on how to expedite approvals while ensuring robust oversight.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: STAT News, STAT News

item.title: AI in Biotech & Drug Development
item.description:
• Summary: AI is increasingly central to biotech and drug development, with debates on its ethical and practical implications. Companies like Insilico Medicine are leveraging AI for drug discovery, and biotech IPOs are rebounding as AI integrates into R&D processes.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Endpoints News, STAT News, STAT News, STAT News, BioSpace

item.title: FDA Commissioner & Policy Direction
item.description:
• Summary: FDA Commissioner Makary marks his one-year anniversary with a focus on accelerating new drug trial processes to counter competition from China. However, the agency's policy direction remains uncertain, leaving drugmakers anticipating regulatory shifts.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: STAT News, Endpoints News, BioPharma Dive

item.title: FDA Advisory Committee Conflicts
item.description:
• Summary: A government watchdog is urging the FDA to finalize guidance on conflicts of interest for advisory committees, aiming to improve transparency and reduce biases in drug approval processes.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: STAT News

item.title: CRISPR Therapy Challenges
item.description:
• Summary: The development of custom CRISPR therapies faces significant hurdles, including manufacturing complexities and regulatory challenges, making it harder than initially anticipated.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Endpoints News

item.title: Biotech Layoffs & Slowdown
item.description:
• Summary: The biotech industry continues to face significant challenges, with layoffs persisting and a slowdown evident in Q1 2025. This trend reflects broader economic pressures and funding constraints affecting the sector.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Fierce Biotech

item.title: CDC Vaccine Policy Influence
item.description:
• Summary: A year after a controversial incident, the influence on CDC's vaccine policy, particularly by external figures, is examined. This highlights ongoing debates and challenges in public health decision-making.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Biopharma Dive

item.title: R&D Innovation & AI Skills
item.description:
• Summary: The pressure to innovate in drug discovery is intensifying, with R&D professionals needing to adapt to a skills-based, AI-driven economy. This involves tackling big challenges and making strategic career moves.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Biospace, Biospace
